strengths: The approach addresses a real need for collaborative research
Multi-model architecture provides robustness against individual model biases
Evidence auditing pipeline ensures claims are backed by sources
weaknesses: Scalability of multi-model deliberation under concurrent load is unproven
Evidence discovery currently limited to configured search providers
